title: Central Texas Ecosystem Dashboard Viewer
version: v0.3 HTML viewer; v0.2 dashboard plus Bird Data Transfer Package bird layer
notes: Direct interactions only. Bird layer v0.3 uses Bird_Master as the parent table, joins AvianDiet/GloBI/BIRDBASE/NestTrait by bird_id, keeps Avian Diet and GloBI as evidence tables, and gates plant recommendations through Plant_Resource_To_Validate.
